text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Look! Isn't this outfit just perfect?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten a lot better at dressing myself, don't
you think? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Osaka Hai, and Fine Motion is
at spirited as ever.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to say hi before the race! Let's have
a good one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've really been looking forward to running with
you, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've... been looking forward to it as well. Let's
both give it everything we've got out there!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Scarlet is such a nice girl, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And it seems she's improved remarkably lately as
well. I've got to be careful!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, it's time to get out there, keep an eye on
Scarlet, and have fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's saying the same things as always... but it
sounds like she's trying to convince herself.
choice_data_list:
When it starts, just forget about everything and
run!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I can't do that. I'm still "Fine Motion" the
lady.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I can't even allow myself to want to forget.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But enough of that! I'm going to give it all I've
got! ♪ I'm going to keep smiling until the very
last step!
